articles.title: Pre-market action: Here's the trade setup for today's session
articles.description: Equity markets faced pressure as Nifty declined, while broader markets showed gains. Analysts expect sideways to mixed trading due to geopolitical tensions and oil prices. The Indian rupee weakened to its lowest level in two months on Monday. India VIX, a fear index, saw a slight decrease settling at 12.98. Stock-specific action is anticipated as the Q1 earnings season progresses.

articles.title: Oil prices dip as mediation efforts offset US-Iran strikes
articles.description: Oil prices softened on Tuesday, with markets weighing ​reports of mediation efforts between the U.S. and Iran against an exchange of ‌fresh attacks between the two and threats of a naval blockade of Saudi Arabia by Yemen's Houthis.

articles.title: Oil Tensions Flare Amidst Mediation Talks
articles.description: Oil prices faced downward pressure due to mediation efforts between the U.S. and Iran, amidst threats from Yemen's Houthis to blockade Saudi Arabia. Brent crude futures declined slightly, while U.S. crude remained stable. Analysts cited the potential for de-escalation talks to influence oil price volatility.

articles.title: Global Market Today: Asian stocks recover as chips rebound, oil dips
articles.description: Asian stocks advanced, recovering from recent losses as chip shares stabilized. Megacap technology earnings are anticipated this week, influencing market direction. Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and trade concerns are creating investor caution. Elevated oil prices and escalating regional conflicts add to market uncertainty. Investors await corporate results and de-escalation for market rebounds.

articles.title: Houthi Red Sea blockade would push oil prices higher
articles.description: The Bab el-Mandeb connects the Red Sea with the Gulf of Aden and is a key route for crude and fuel shipments moving between the Middle East, Europe and Asia

articles.title: Sensex Today | Stock Market LIVE Updates: Defiant Nifty bulls aim to protect 24,200 ahead of busy earnings day, weekly expiry
articles.description: Sensex Today | Stock Market LIVE Updates: The Nifty bulls enter today's weekly expiry session on the back of a defiant tone in which they intend on protecting the 24,200 - 24,000 zone on the downside, despite crude oil prices continuing to hover between $88 to $90 a barrel mark.

articles.title: Pacific Markets Mixed as S&P 500 Slips Amid Rising Oil Prices and Uncertainty
articles.description: Asia-Pacific equity markets traded mixed as rising oil prices and a softer S&P 500 close shaped regional sentiment. Australia's ASX 200 fell 0.53%, Japan's Nikkei 225 gained 1.28% on its return from a public holiday, and South Korea's KOSPI edged up 0.23%, reflecting divergent risk appetite across the region.

articles.title: 3 Canadian Energy Stocks to Watch as Oil Headlines Heat Up
articles.description: Explore the latest trends in energy as oil prices surge to US$79 per barrel amidst ongoing United States-Iran negotiations.

articles.title: Rupee hits two-month low despite RBI intervention as crude oil surge weighs
articles.description: The Indian rupee fell to a two-month low against the dollar on Monday. This decline occurred despite significant interventions by the central bank. Rising crude oil prices are fueling inflation concerns across the economy. The market anticipates continued volatility influenced by oil and dollar strength. The Reserve Bank of India is expected to intervene further to support the rupee.

articles.title: Robber pointed knife at petrol station worker's chest and told him 'Open the till, give me the money'
articles.description: Reece Gillon has been jailed for three-and-a-half years at Newcastle Crown Court
